action.reasoning: Fix the Conv2d channel mismatch. SB3 MultiInputPolicy preprocesses image obs by transposing to CHW only if the obs space is declared as image (3D with channels). Since Minigrid image is (7,7,3), SB3 may not auto-transpose. I'll fix the feature extractor to handle the actual input format, or better yet use a simpler flat MLP approach that's more robust. Training 5M steps with 40 envs.
